name: Soya Bean Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the cooked soya beans with chopped onion.
2. Add tomato paste and chilli sauce to the mixture.
3. Stir in chopped parsley until well combined.
4. Gradually add breadcrumbs, egg, milk, dry breadcrumbs, sesame seeds, and wholemeal flour.
5. Mix all ingredients thoroughly until a cohesive dough forms.
6. Shape the mixture into patties.
7. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat.
8. Carefully place the patties into the hot oil.
9. Cook both sides until golden brown and crispy.
10. Remove the patties from the oil using tongs or a spatula.
11. Allow the patties to cool before serving.
